name: Pokédex Voice Over
author: SilvertongueRED
description: Reads every Pokédex entry aloud in the style of Dexter, the classic anime narrator. Ships an offline Fish-Speech voice-clone sidecar with a bundled portable Python 3.12 — no admin, no PATH changes, no SmartScreen prompts. First launch installs torch + fish-speech and downloads the ~1.4 GB voice-clone model from Hugging Face which will take several minutes on first-launch with the mod; everything after that runs fully offline with zero network calls, no API keys, and much more quickly.
